subject: Cloud Computing
title: Foundation Models and Cloud Marketplaces
description: A fast breakdown of Foundation Models and Cloud Marketplaces for builders.

hook.text: AWS Bedrock, Azure OpenAI, and Google Vertex AI let you access GPT-4, Claude, and Llama through your cloud account.

buildup.text: Foundation models are general-purpose AI models that can be fine-tuned for specific tasks. Cloud provides the platform.

discovery.text: Model marketplaces let you compare models, switch providers, and run them within your security perimeter.

twist.text: Cloud provider competition now centers on AI model access. Whoever has the best models wins cloud customers.

climax.text: Foundation models are reshaping cloud strategy. Cloud is no longer just infrastructure — it's the AI model marketplace.

punchline.text: Cloud providers sell AI models now. Infrastructure is just the platform.

quiz.question: How are foundation models changing cloud competition?
options: Cloud providers compete on AI model access, not just infrastructure and pricing
Foundation models have made cloud computing obsolete
Only one cloud provider is allowed to offer foundation models
